Description: The invoice either does not contain the correct ABN/GST information, or it is missing.
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit corrected invoice with valid ABN and correct GST
Possible_Outcomes: Corrected invoice submitted, ABN/GST status updated
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to ABN/GST issue; corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Reminder to submit corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder; advised invoice will be rejected in 2 days.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected. Client notified.
Key_Principles: Valid ABN required; GST only charged by registered suppliers; non-compliant invoices rejected
Examples: Missing ABN on invoice; inactive ABN; GST charged by unregistered supplier
Notes: Auto-reject candidate - AI can detect missing/invalid ABN with high accuracy
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source; changed Cadence_Days from 0 to 10 per source comms cycle

Description: The invoiced units * rate do not match the invoice total. The subtotal + GST does not match the invoice total.
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit corrected invoice with accurate calculations
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to calculation error; corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Reminder to submit corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder; advised invoice will be rejected in 2 days.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected. Client notified.
Key_Principles: Invoices must be mathematically accurate; reject only after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Line total doesn't match unit rate x quantity; GST calculation incorrect
Notes: Auto-reject candidate - AI can detect calculation mismatches with high accuracy
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source

Description: The invoice does not contain the client name(s)
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit corrected invoice with correct client name
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to missing or incorrect client name; corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Reminder to submit corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder; advised invoice will be rejected in 2 days.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected. Client notified.
Key_Principles: Client name mandatory; no payment without correct identification; actions documented
Examples: Client name missing; generic name used; client name misspelled
Notes: Auto-reject candidate - AI can detect missing/invalid client names with high accuracy
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source; changed Cadence_Days from 0 to 10 per source comms cycle

Description: The invoice is not itemised to clearly display a specific service date, number of units, and/or rate.
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit fully itemised invoice
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to insufficient itemisation; itemised invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Reminder to submit itemised invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder; advised invoice will be rejected in 2 days.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected. Client notified.
Key_Principles: Clear itemisation required; lump sums not accepted; actions documented
Examples: Lump sum invoice without line items; missing service dates; no unit rates shown
Notes: Auto-reject candidate - AI can detect missing itemization with high accuracy
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source; changed Cadence_Days from 0 to 10 per source comms cycle

Description: Service rate or item cost exceeds Trilogy Care's master price list.
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide evidence of client consent or submit revised invoice
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to rate exceeding approved price list; consent evidence or corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Follow-up requesting consent evidence or corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder; advised invoice will be rejected.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected. Client notified.
Key_Principles: Rates must not exceed approved limits; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Rate $50/hr when approved rate is $40/hr; no client consent documented
Notes: Requires human review to compare against price list
Comments: No change

Description: The invoice was received after the cut off date for the quarter. NOTE: Hard limit 60 days.
Supplier_Action_Required: Amend invoice to eligible quarter or confirm private billing
Possible_Outcomes: Invoice corrected to eligible quarter, Private billing confirmed
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to service date outside current quarter.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final clarification request if service date contested.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if outside eligible quarter.
Key_Principles: Quarter dates apply strictly; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Service provided in Q2 but invoiced in Q3 funding period
Notes: May require care partner review to confirm quarter boundaries
Comments: Updated Detail with hard limit note from SAH source

Description: The invoice was received outside the funding period for a short-term funding stream.
Supplier_Action_Required: Amend invoice or confirm private billing
Possible_Outcomes: Invoice corrected, Client elects private payment
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to service date outside approved funding period.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if service date outside funding period.
Key_Principles: Funding dates must be respected; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Service provided before funding start date; service after funding end date
Notes: Related to Quarter end date but broader - covers entire funding period
Comments: No change

Description: The supplier profile is in the stage [New provider, information requested, missing docs, information received, and brokering]
Supplier_Action_Required: Complete supplier registration
Possible_Outcomes: Supplier completes registration and resubmits invoice
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to incomplete supplier registration; completion requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder to complete registration.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if registration incomplete.
Key_Principles: Supplier registration mandatory; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Missing insurance documents; ABN verification pending; bank details not provided
Notes: Contextual hold - invoice itself is fine but supplier status blocks payment
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source with specific stages

Description: A supplier with a matching ABN cannot be identified.
Supplier_Action_Required: Register as supplier
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to no registered supplier record; registration requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder to register to enable payment.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if registration not completed.
Key_Principles: Supplier must be registered; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: ABN not found in system; new supplier not yet onboarded
Notes: Contextual hold - invoice itself is fine but supplier doesn't exist in system
Comments: No change

Reason: Supplier not registered for service type
Description: The services provided section on the supplier profile does not contain the relevant service type
Supplier_Action_Required: Update registration or amend invoice
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to supplier not approved for billed service type; update requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder to update service registration.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if service type not registered.
Key_Principles: Correct service registration required; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Supplier registered for cleaning but invoicing for nursing; service type mismatch
Notes: Contextual hold - could be resolved by updating supplier registration
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source

Description: The supplier is in the stage [suspended]
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to active performance improvement process.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if supplier remains suspended.
Key_Principles: Client safety priority; evidence-based escalation; actions documented
Examples: Supplier under investigation for quality issues; active PIP in place
Notes: No fixed timeframe - duration determined by Compliance/Quality team
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source with specific stage

Description: The rate on the invoice exceeds the amount on the supplier's price list.
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide evidence of client consent or submit revised invoice
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to unapproved price increase; consent or corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder to provide consent or corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if no consent provided.
Key_Principles: Client approval required; reject after 10 days unresolved; actions documented
Examples: Rate increase from $40/hr to $50/hr without client consent documented
Notes: May allow additional time if client engagement is active
Comments: No change

Description: The supplier is in the stage [Expired/terminated, and not verified]
Supplier_Action_Required: Contact client for alternative provider; cannot resubmit for post-termination dates
Possible_Outcomes: Invoice corrected for eligible dates only, Client transitions supplier
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice cannot proceed due to supplier termination status; invoice rejected for post-termination service dates.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if service dates post-termination.
Key_Principles: No payment after termination date; immediate rejection if post-termination; actions documented
Examples: Service provided after supplier contract terminated; supplier relationship ended
Notes: Should dominate communication - other issues become irrelevant
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source with specific stages

Description: Multiple service types across contribution categories are bundled together without itemisation.
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit fully itemised invoice with services separated by contribution category
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected due to services bundled across contribution categories; itemised invoice required.
Key_Principles: Itemisation mandatory across contribution categories; no interpretation of bundled charges
Examples: Services from different contribution categories grouped as single line item
Notes: Auto-reject candidate - related to general itemisation requirement
Comments: No change

Description: Transport charges are unclear, bundled, or incorrectly billed
Bill_Processor_Action: Place invoice on hold or reject
Supplier_Action_Required: Submit corrected invoice with transport properly itemised
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Invoice placed on hold due to incorrect or unclear transport charges; corrected invoice requested.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Final reminder to submit corrected invoice.
Day_7_Comms: Supplier: Invoice rejected if transport not itemised.
Key_Principles: Transport must be itemised; staff travel not claimable; reject after 10 days unresolved
Examples: Transport bundled with service charges; staff travel charged to client incorrectly
Notes: Related to itemisation but specifically for transport/travel
Comments: No change

Description: The client does not have a sufficient balance in the specified funding stream or unspent funds to accommodate the expenditure.
Department_Action: Review budget allocation and spend; communicate with client; assess funding availability; request voluntary contribution if needed
Supplier_Action_Required: Budget updated, Voluntary contribution made, Package review initiated
Day_0_Comms: Client: Email noting bill cannot be paid due to insufficient balance. Request VC or CP contact within 48 hours.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder for VC or CP contact.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Reminder, noting if not received in 48 hrs bill will be rejected and supplier notified.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Bill rejected. Supplier: Bill rejected.
Key_Principles: Client given at least 7 days to respond; reject after Day 10; actions documented
Examples: Client has $100 remaining but invoice is $500; package funds depleted
Notes: Day 8: 48-hour extension granted before rejection - contextual hold
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source with funding stream reference

Description: The service type is not contained in the client's budget.
Department_Action: Confirm service intent; obtain client approval
Supplier_Action_Required: Budget updated, Client elects private payment
Day_0_Comms: Client: Notified service not included in approved budget; confirmation required.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder to confirm service intent. Coordinator: Notified. Supplier: Update sent.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Final notice to confirm budget update or private payment.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Invoice rejected due to no response.
Key_Principles: Client given at least 7 days to respond; reject after Day 10; actions documented
Examples: Cleaning service invoiced but only personal care in approved budget
Notes: Day 8: 48-hour extension to update care plan - contextual hold
Comments: No change

Description: Record flagged for exception - coordinator approval required
Department_Action: Liaise with coordinator; obtain approval decision
Day_0_Comms: Coordinator: Notified approval required for invoice to proceed. Client: Notified invoice on hold.
Day_3_Comms: Coordinator: Reminder approval still required. Client: Notified invoice remains on hold.
Day_7_Comms: Coordinator: Final reminder; advised invoice may be rejected.
Day_10_Comms: Coordinator: Invoice rejected due to no response.
Key_Principles: Coordinator contacted first; reject after Day 10 unresolved; actions documented
Examples: High-value purchase requiring coordinator sign-off; exception to standard budget
Notes: Day 8: Client given 48 hours to approve directly - contextual hold
Comments: No change

Description: Record flagged for exception - client approval required
Department_Action: Review exception; contact client; record response
Supplier_Action_Required: Client approval confirmed, Approval not provided
Day_0_Comms: Client: Approval request sent. Supplier: Invoice placed on hold pending client approval.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder approval required. Supplier: Update invoice remains on hold.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Follow-up advising bill will be rejected if approval not received.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Bill rejected notification. Supplier: Bill rejected notification.
Key_Principles: Client approval mandatory where flagged; payment cannot proceed without explicit approval; decisions documented
Examples: Service outside normal care plan; one-off purchase requiring explicit consent
Notes: Contextual hold - awaiting client decision
Comments: No change

Description: When we receive a bill for a service not included in the budget, we process it as unplanned services UP TO $1,000. When invoice and line items total ≥$1,000, bill is placed on hold.
Department_Action: Review spend against cap; discuss with client; update budget if approved
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to confirm whether service should be added to budget. Supplier: Invoice on hold pending client response.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Advised bill will be rejected if budget update not confirmed.
Key_Principles: Spending must not exceed approved caps; budget updates required for continuation
Examples: Ad-hoc services exceeded allocated cap amount
Notes: Contextual hold - requires budget review
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source with $1000 threshold explanation

Description: The service or support invoiced needs funding through a stream that's not available (verified by Services Australia). Common Scenarios: ATHM item with no verified unspent HCP funds; No Commonwealth unspent funds available; No AT/HM funding streams; Bill received before ACER lodged.
Department_Action: Identify unverified funding; review eligibility; confirm source; Check care plan stage in CRM is 'care plan sent'; Check ACER has been lodged
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to confirm funding stream or budget update. Supplier: Invoice on hold pending funding verification.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Advised bill will be rejected if funding not verified.
Key_Principles: Funding streams must be verified before payment
Examples: New funding source not yet validated in system
Notes: Contextual hold - administrative verification needed
Comments: Updated Detail and Department_Action from SAH source with common scenarios and CRM checks

Description: The bill lists a service the client is not approved to receive. Client Approval Levels: Grandfathered clients have full approval from SAH services list; Hybrid (transitional) have full approval from SAH services list; New SAH clients may be approved for limited services.
Department_Action: Review against care plan; confirm whether service can be approved; If client needs the service: request review in MAC
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to confirm whether service should be approved/added to plan. Supplier: Invoice on hold pending client response.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Advised bill will be rejected if service not approved.
Key_Principles: Only approved services may be funded
Examples: Service not listed in NOD; service outside care plan scope
Notes: Contextual hold - requires care plan update
Comments: Updated Detail and Department_Action from SAH source with client approval level explanations

Description: Invoice relates to Assistive Technology and Home Modifications. What IS ATHM: Falls and personal alarms (prescribed items); Clinical prescription and support service type; Assistive technology items; Home modifications. What is NOT ATHM: Continence aids; Oxygen; Catheter equipment; Wound care (these are nursing care consumables funded through ongoing quarterly funding).
Department_Action: Manage assessment and approval manually in line with ATHM requirements; Check if ATHM or Home Care Account funding is available; Verify funding position: check AT-HM approval status and ATHM date of purchase; If AT/HM funding is approved, check entry has been recorded in PRODA
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A
Day_0_Comms: No further Action as awaiting funds to be available
Key_Principles: ATHM items are not processed via standard billing automation
Examples: Home modifications; assistive technology purchases
Notes: Special workflow - not standard bill processing
Comments: Updated Detail and Department_Action from SAH source with ATHM definitions

Description: The invoice exceeds budgeted hourly rate
Department_Action: Review rate; discuss with client; update budget if approved; Calculate variance between budgeted and invoiced rate; Options: Update budget / One-off unplanned / VC / Reject
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to confirm whether rate increase should be approved. Supplier: Invoice on hold pending client response.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Advised bill will be rejected if rate not approved.
Key_Principles: Rates must align with approved budget
Examples: Budgeted rate $40/hr but invoiced $45/hr
Notes: Contextual hold - requires budget/rate approval
Comments: Updated Department_Action from SAH source with specific options

Description: The invoice exceeds budgeted quantity
Department_Action: Review quantity; discuss with client; update budget if approved; If transitioned, update budget. If new and service is in Notice of Decision (NOD), update budget.
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to confirm whether additional quantity should be approved. Supplier: Invoice on hold pending client response.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Advised bill will be rejected if quantity not approved.
Key_Principles: Quantities must align with approved plan
Examples: Approved 10 hours but invoiced 15 hours
Notes: Contextual hold - requires quantity approval
Comments: Updated Department_Action from SAH source with transitional handling

Description: The service date is before the client's commencement date with Trilogy Care
Bill_Processor_Action: Review service date; confirm with client
Department_Action: Determine eligibility; Check commencement date; Is the item an essential service; Update ACER if possible (new packages only); Refer to previous provider (transfers only)
Supplier_Action_Required: Check with supplier that service date is correct
Possible_Outcomes: Service confirmed and progressed, Invoice rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Email informing the bill cannot be paid due to service occurring prior to commencement. Query Voluntary Contribution or rejection preference. Supplier: Email to advise on hold pending client contact.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder email. Supplier: Email to advise on hold pending client contact.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Reminder email. Supplier: Email to advise on hold pending client contact.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Bill rejected. Supplier: Bill rejected.
Key_Principles: Services must fall within valid commencement period
Examples: Service provided before client's program start date
Notes: Immediate rejection - cannot pay for pre-commencement services
Comments: Updated Department_Action from SAH source with essential service and ACER checks

Description: The service date is after the client's exit date with Trilogy Care
Bill_Processor_Action: Review service date; confirm with client
Department_Action: Determine eligibility; Check termination date; Check that the exit date is correct; Refer to new provider (transfers only); Refer to client (left program only)
Supplier_Action_Required: Check with supplier that service date is correct
Possible_Outcomes: Service confirmed and progressed, Invoice rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Email informing that bill cannot be paid due to service occurring after termination date. If transferred, ask to submit to new provider. If terminated, ask to arrange direct payment. Supplier: Advise service past active date with TC.
Day_3_Comms: NA
Day_7_Comms: NA
Day_10_Comms: Client: Bill rejected. Supplier: Bill rejected.
Key_Principles: Services must fall within approved care period
Examples: Service provided after client exited program
Notes: Immediate rejection - cannot pay for post-termination services
Comments: Updated Department_Action from SAH source with transfer handling

Description: The client record in MYOB does not contain verified bank details.
Bill_Processor_Action: Identify missing/invalid details; attempt to obtain
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A (client action)
Possible_Outcomes: Bank details obtained and payment proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to request missing or corrected bank details. Call advise bills status and requirement to provide bank details. Email to callback sent if contact is unsuccessful.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder email
Day_7_Comms: Client: Follow-up Call. Email to callback sent if contact is unsuccessful.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected due to missing bank details.
Key_Principles: Valid bank details required before payment
Examples: Client bank account not on file; invalid BSB
Notes: Contextual hold - awaiting client information
Comments: Updated Detail and Day_0_Comms from SAH source

Description: The supplier record in MYOB does not contain verified bank details.
Bill_Processor_Action: Identify missing/invalid details; attempt to obtain
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide valid bank details
Possible_Outcomes: Bank details obtained and payment proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Contacted to request missing or corrected bank details.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Notified bill rejected due to missing bank details.
Key_Principles: Valid supplier bank details required before payment
Examples: Supplier bank account not on file; invalid account number
Notes: Contextual hold - awaiting supplier information
Comments: No change

Description: A reimbursement request has been submitted without proof of payment (e.g. bank confirmation, receipt, zero balance statement)
Bill_Processor_Action: Identify missing proof; request from client
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide proof of payment
Possible_Outcomes: Proof obtained and reimbursement proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to request proof of payment.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected due to missing proof of payment.
Key_Principles: Proof of payment required for reimbursement
Examples: Client claiming reimbursement without receipt
Notes: Applies to reimbursement claims only
Comments: Updated Detail from source with examples

Description: A reimbursement request has been submitted without the original supplier invoice.
Bill_Processor_Action: Identify missing invoice; request from client
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide original supplier invoice
Possible_Outcomes: Invoice obtained and reimbursement proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted to request original supplier invoice.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected due to missing supplier invoice.
Key_Principles: Original supplier invoice mandatory for reimbursement
Examples: Client claiming reimbursement without original invoice
Notes: Applies to reimbursement claims only
Comments: No change

Description: Bill failed the final Finance QA review
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A
Possible_Outcomes: QA issue resolved and bill proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected following QA review.
Key_Principles: Bills must pass Finance QA before payment
Examples: Data integrity issue detected; compliance check failed in final review
Notes: Immediate rejection after QA review
Comments: No change

Description: Does not fit into any of the above. This will be reviewed monthly to identify any other recurring reasons that may need to be created.
Supplier_Action_Required: Provide clarification as requested
Possible_Outcomes: Issue resolved and bill proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Supplier: Contacted regarding issue requiring clarification.
Day_3_Comms: Supplier: Follow-up reminder sent if clarification not received.
Day_10_Comms: Supplier: Notified bill rejected.
Key_Principles: All bills must meet minimum processing requirements
Examples: Edge case not covered by standard reasons
Notes: Catch-all for undefined issues
Comments: Updated Detail from SAH source

Description: The client doesn't have a MYOB Record / Stage is on Client Onboarding
Bill_Processor_Action: Place invoice on hold pending client activation
Department_Action: Verify client status in MYOB; Check onboarding stage; Escalate to onboarding team if required
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A
Possible_Outcomes: Client activated and invoice proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted regarding onboarding status. Invoice on hold pending client activation.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder regarding onboarding completion.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Final notice regarding onboarding.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected due to client not active.
Key_Principles: Client must be active in MYOB before payment can proceed
Examples: Client in onboarding stage; No MYOB record exists
Notes: Contextual hold - awaiting client activation
Comments: NEW - Added from Proposed Addl On Hold Reason source

Description: Budget is In Draft
Bill_Processor_Action: Place invoice on hold pending budget activation
Department_Action: Verify budget status; Move budget from Draft to Active if appropriate; Liaise with Care Partner to finalise budget
Supplier_Action_Required: N/A
Possible_Outcomes: Budget activated and invoice proceeds, Bill rejected
Day_0_Comms: Client: Contacted regarding budget status. Invoice on hold pending budget activation.
Day_3_Comms: Client: Reminder regarding budget finalisation.
Day_7_Comms: Client: Final notice regarding budget.
Day_10_Comms: Client: Notified bill rejected due to budget not active.
Key_Principles: Budget must be active before payment can proceed
Examples: Budget still in draft stage; Budget not yet approved
Notes: Contextual hold - awaiting budget activation
Comments: NEW - Added from Proposed Addl On Hold Reason source
